Clyde's Normal and Charged Attacks will be converted into Quantum DMG and deal additional DMG based on 8% of his Hyperion Energy. During Overclocked state, if Hyperion Energy is less than 100% of Clyde's Max HP, his Normal Attack "Eclipser" will gains Eclipsed Kingdom effect. When Normal Skill "Graviton Mark Protocol" is casted during this state, it will gains Voidpiercer effect.

riftedTalent.name: Rifted Technology
riftedTalent.desc: Clyde's Normal and Charged Attacks generate 1 Flux.

others.name: ■■■■■■■■'s Decendent
others.desc: Being the decendent of ■■■■■■■■, Clyde gains 40% Quantum DMG Bonus.

others.name: Hyperion Energy
others.desc: Hyperion Energy can be accumulated up to 200% of the Character's Max HP. Hyperion Energy can impact the affected character in various way.

others.name: Hyperion Energy: Rejection
others.desc: When a character is affected by Hyperion Energy, they are immune to healing from allies or external effects and can only heal themselves. If another source attempts to heal them, the healing is nullified, and the Hyperion Energy is reduced by an amount equal to the HP that would have been healed. Additionally, if the affected character cannot utilize Hyperion Energy, their Crit Rate is reduced by 24% and Disorder DMG is reduced by 40%.

normalAttack.name: Eclipser
normalAttack.desc:
Clyde deals 40% Physical ATK as Physical DMG to the opponent.
Eclipsed Kingdom: Eclipser will fire 1 extra shot, increasing his Hyperion Energy by 80% of the DMG dealt.

chargedAttack.name: Graviton Absorption
chargedAttack.desc: Clyde deals 60% Physical ATK as Physical DMG to the opponent and absorbs all Graviton Marks from the opponents. If the Graviton Mark is in Temporal Latch, it absorbs 12 (+38% Opponent's Current HP) as Hyperion Energy, if the Graviton Mark is in Entropy Core, it absorbs 218 (+8% Opponent's Max HP) multiplied by the duration of Graviton Mark as Hyperion Energy.

normalSkill.name: Graviton Mark Protocol
normalSkill.desc:
Clyde strikes nearby opponents using Eclipser, dealing 112 (+48% Physical ATK) as Quantum DMG and applying Graviton Mark: Temporal Latch to opponents hit for 8 Cycles. Temporal Latch: Gradually deals 12 (+18% Physical ATK) as Physical DMG each Cycle. Entropy Core: After an opponent is affected by Temporal Latch for 2 Cycles, it will transform into Entropy Core dealing 98 (+51% Physical ATK) as Quantum DMG each Cycle. This effect carries over the duration from Temporal Latch.
Voidpiercer: Clyde uses Voidpiercer and launches a Chrono Shard, dealing 68 (+11% Hyperion Energy) as Physical DMG. If Hyperion Energy is greater than 100% of Clyde's Max HP, Chrono Shard will deal 211 + (21% Hyperion Energy) as Quantum DMG, consuming all Hyperion Energy, healing himself by 40% of his consumed Hyperion Energy and exiting the Overclocked state. This skill can be cased independently without the use of Flux during the Overclocked State.

riftedSkill.name: Collapse Singularity
riftedSkill.desc: Clyde absorbs all Graviton Mark from the opponent and unleashes a Rfit Collapse using Voidpiercer, dealing 214 (+112% Physical ATK) (+26% Hyperion Energy) as Quantum DMG, consuming his Hyperion Energy and exiting from Overclocked state, and healing himself by 60% of consumed Hyperion Energy.

fragments.name: Corruption
fragments.desc: Clyde will gain 40% extra Hyperion Energy while absorbing Graviton Marks.

fragments.name: Confusion Matrix
fragments.desc: "Graviton Mark Protocol" will directly apply Graviton Mark: Entropy Core to opponents.

fragments.name: Beyond The Universe
fragments.desc: "Graviton Mark Protocol" level is increased by 3.

fragments.name: Witness
fragments.desc: Dealing Quantum DMG generates 25 Surges. This effect can occour once every 3 Cycles.

fragments.name: Collapsing Black Hole
fragments.desc: "Collapse Singularity" level is increased by 3.

fragments.name: Conqueor of Universes
fragments.desc: Quantum DMG Bonus is increased by 20%. The DMG of Collapse Singularity is increased by Clyde's ATK multiplied by 700% of Clyde's current Hyperion Energy percentage. For 3 Cycles after Clyde uses Graviton Mark Protocol, Clyde gains 10% CRIT Rate and 80% CRIT DMG. This effect can triggered once every 8 Cycles.

log.description:
Siren (↓): After extended amount of discussion and testing, Siren is too overpowered in her Reactions capabilities. We decided to restrict her Special Reactions to a specific category.

The aforementioned effects will not stack.
	Rifted Disorder (↓): Triggering reactions generates additional 3 Echo Memory and 15 energy >> Triggering Electrified or Supercharged Reactions generates additional 3 Echo Memory and 15 energy.

Additionally, her Reaction DMG Bonus is increased by 40% >> While Siren is in the team, All Electrified Reactions triggered by team members will deal additional DMG based on 700% of Siren's Knowledge Unit, and all Supercharged Reactions triggered by Siren's Violet-Tainted Tide DMG will deal additional DMG based on 500% of Siren's Knowledge Unit. Each instance of Zuxing marks the opponent with Xing Marks. When there are 4 Xing Marks on the opponent, the next instance of DMG will deal 150% Intelligence Unit as True DMG, removing all the Xing Marks.

During a single cycle, every instance of DMG dealt by Zuxing will increase her next instance of DMG by 12%. The maximum DMG bonus can be gained through this way is 180%.

riftedTalent.name: Rifted Technology
riftedTalent.desc: Zuxing's Normal and Charged Attacks generate 1 Flux.

others.name: Intelligence Network
others.desc:
Certain skills of Intelligence-Type characters can hijack the opponent, applying 1 stack of Hijacked, max 20 stacks.
Hijacked: Increases the Focus build-up rate of the affected opponent by 2%.

others.name: Polymetric Combustion
others.desc: Zuxing can triigger Polymetric Combustion. When Zuxing is in the team, Polymetric Combustion DMG is elevated by 3%.

normalAttack.name: Edgebound Decryption
normalAttack.desc:
Zuxing uses her Xing Unit to prototype an edgebound, piercing through the selected opponent, dealing [$_1, 23] (+[$_2, 0.082]% Max HP) as Artificial DMG, applying 1 stacks of Hijacked to the opponent. The edgebound prototype comes back and heal all team members by [$_3, 112] (+[$_4, 0.163]% Max HP).

Riftedbound Decryption: Zuxing uses her Xing Units to prototype a riftbound, dealing 3 instances of [$_5, 11] (+[$_6, 0.62]% Intelligence Unit) as Artificial DMG. Every instance of DMG dealt by this attack will summon 1 Riftbound Xing Unit at the targeted opponent.

chargedAttack.name: Edgebound Completion
chargedAttack.desc:
Zuxing uses her Zui Unit to prototype a completion of an edgebound, piercing through the selected opponent, dealing [$_1, 31] (+[$_2, 0.098]% Max HP) as Artificial DMG, applying 3 stacks of Hijacked to the opponent. The edgebound prototype comes back and heal all team members by [$_3, 154] (+[$_4, 0.201]% Max HP).

Riftedbound Completion: Zuxing uses her Xing Units to prototype a riftbound, dealing 3 instances of [$_5, 11] (+[$_6, 0.62]% Intelligence Unit) as Artificial DMG. After completing the riftbound, the riftbound detonates, dealing [$_7, 23] (+[$_8, 0.94]% Intelligence Unit) as Artificial DMG. The first 3 instance of DMG dealt by this attack will summon 1 Riftbound Xing Unit at the targeted opponent. The final detonation will summon 2 Riftbound Xing Units at the targeted opponent.

normalSkill.name: Transformative Units
normalSkill.desc:
This skill has 2 different actions based on Zuxing's current architecture:

Edgebound Architecture: Zuxing converts her Units to prototype a Riftbound Architecture, removing all debuffs from her, and converting her Normal Attack "Edgebound Decryption", Charged Attack "Edgebound Completion", and Rifted Skill "Zui Invasion" into "Riftbound Decryption", "Riftbound Completion", and "Xing Invasion" respectively.

Riftbound Architecture: Zuxing converts her Units to prototype an Edgebound Architecture, dealing [$_1, 87] (+[$_2, 0.12]% Max HP) to all opponents in the field as AoE Artificial DMG, reducing all opponent's DEF by 12%, and converting her Normal Attack "Riftbound Decryption", Charged Attack "Riftbound Completion", and Rifted Skill "Xing Invasion" into "Edgebound Decryption", "Edgebound Completion", and "Zui Invasion" respectively.

Zuxing will adapts to the different architectures:

Edgebound Architecture: Converts [$_1, 0.12]% of her Intelligence Unit into Max HP. (Gains 10 HP for every 1 Intelligence Unit).
Riftbound Architecture: Converts [$_2, 0.04]% of her Max HP into Intelligence Unit.

riftedSkill.name: Zui Invasion
riftedSkill.desc:
Zuxing conducts the execution of Zui Units, each unit deals [$_1, 54] (+[$_2, 0.18]% Max HP) multiplied by the stack of Hijacked on the opponent as Artificial DMG to each opponent in the field, while healing all team members by [$_3, 206] (+[$_4, 0.16]% Max HP) multiplied by 50% of all stacks of Hijacked on all opponents on the field.

Xing Invasion: Zuxing orders all Riftbound Xing Units surrounding the opponent to strike the opponent at once, each dealing [$_5, 56] (+[$_6, 0.72]% Intelligence Unit) as Artificial DMG. The maximum amount of Riftbound Xing Unit can orbit each opponent is 22.

fragments.name: Unit Overload
fragments.desc: When there are 4 Xing Marks on the opponent, the next instance of DMG dealt will be further increased by 50%. Additionally, that instance of DMG dealt has a 30% chance to recover 1 Xing Mark as well as 50% chance to generate 1 Flux.

fragments.name: Hong Network Intel
fragments.desc: When focused onto an opponent, Zuxing's Artificial DMG Bonus is increased by 25% and her Riftbound Xing Units deals 25% extra DMG.

fragments.name: Global Threat Annihilation
fragments.desc: "Zui Invasion" level is increased by 3.

fragments.name: Hong's Orders
fragments.desc:
Zuxing will gains different buffs based on her current architecture:

Edgebound Architecture: Zuxing HP is increased by 20%. Additionally, everytime she heals a team member, she gains 1 Edgebound Fragment. For every 6 Edgebound Fragment she obtains, consumes all Edgebound Fragments and generates 1 Flux.
Riftbound Architecture: Zuxing CRIT Rate is increased by 20%. Additionally, every 11th Riftbound Xing Unit during "Xing Invasion" that hit the opponent generates 1 Flux.

fragments.name: Modern Architecture
fragments.desc: "Transformative Units" level is increased by 3.

fragments.name: Memories of The Past
fragments.desc: Casting Zuxing Normal Skill "Transformative Units" no longer counts as an action. Additionally, after casting Normal Skill "Transformative Units", Zuxing's Normal and Charged Attacks DMG is increased by 48% for the next 2 Cycles.

coreTalent.name: Corrupted Heart
coreTalent.desc:
Human Form: Lexar receives a DMG Bonus based on the percentage of the opponent's current HP. Inflicting DMG in Human Form grants Execution Claws.

Abyssal Form: Lexar receives a DMG Bonus based on the percentage of the opponent's lost HP. Inflicting DMG in Abyssal Form grants Everlasting Bullets.

The maximum amount of Everlasting Bullets and Execution Claws is 4.

riftedTalent.name: Rifted Technology
riftedTalent.desc: Lexar's Normal and Charged Attacks generate 1 Flux.

others.name: Everlasting Bullets
others.desc: In the Human Form, Lexar can consume Everlasting Bullets to enchance the DMG of his attacks by 100%.

others.name: Execution Claws
others.desc: In the Abyssal Form, if Lexar has at least 1 Execution Claw, and the opponent's Current HP is below 0.8% of their Max HP, Lexar consumes all stacks of Execution Claw to immediately execute the opponent. Each extra stack of Execution Claw increases this execution threshold by 0.8%.

normalAttack.name: Desires
normalAttack.desc:
Human Form: Lexar fires a bullet at the opponent, dealing [$_1, 22] (+[$_2, 0.54]% DEF) as Destruction DMG.

Abyssal Form: Lexar cleaves through the opponent, dealing [$_3, 28] (+[$_4, 0.56]% DEF) as Destruction DMG.

chargedAttack.name: Equivalent Karma
chargedAttack.desc:
Human Form: Lexar emits a roar, creating a shockwave that deals [$_1, 11] (+[$_2, 0.36]% DEF) as Destruction DMG, transforming himself into Abyssal Form.

Abyssal Form: Lexar reverts to his Human Form, increasing his SPD by [$_3, 18] for 2 Cycles.

normalSkill.name: Formula Disruption
normalSkill.desc:
Human Form: Lexar fires a net at the target dealing [$_1, 31] (+[$_2, 0.44]% DEF) as Destruction DMG, and supressing them for 1 Turn.

Abyssal Form: Lexar slashes the target dealing [$_3, 44] (+[$_4, 0.65]% DEF) as Destruction DMG. If the opponent Current HP is below 50% of their Max HP, Lexar immediately casts Formula Disruption again and slashes a nearby opponent. This effect cannot riicochet back to the already affected opponent.

riftedSkill.name: Genetic Evolution
riftedSkill.desc:
Human Form: Lexar injects himself with a Vaccine, healing himself for [$_1, 33] (+[$_2, 0.78]% DEF) and reloading his Everlasting Bullets to maximum capacity.

Abyssal Form: Lexar injects himself with a Virus Serum, losing 8% of his current HP while gaining [$_3, 0.08]% CRIT Rate, and [$_4, 0.12]% DEF for 3 Cycles.

fragments.name: Scientist's Nightmares
fragments.desc: In Human Form, Lexar deals additional DMG based on 4% opponent's Current HP. In Abyssal Form, Lexar deals additional DMG based on 4% opponent's Lost HP. The base DMG Bonus of this effect cannot exceed 500% of Lexar's DEF.

fragments.name: Disoriented World
fragments.desc: Opponent hit by the net from "Formula Distruption" have their Destruction RES reduced by 36%.

fragments.name: Concluded
fragments.desc: "Desires" level is increased by 3.

fragments.name: Association of Greed
fragments.desc: Dealing DMG in both forms grants Executing Bullets instead of Everlasting Bullets and Execution Claws. The maximum amount of Executing Bullets can be obtained is 6. In Human Form, Lexar can consume Execution Bullets to enchance the DMG of his attacks by 125%. In the Abyssal Form, if Lexar has at least 1 Execution Bullet, and the opponent's Current HP is below 1% of their Max HP, Lexar consumes all Execution Bullets to immediately execute the opponent. Each extra stack of Execution Bullet increases this execution threshold by 1%.

fragments.name: Corrupted Genes
fragments.desc: "Formula Disruption" level is increased by 3.

fragments.name: Finale of Skies
fragments.desc: Inflicting DMG in Abyssal Form applies Torn to the opponent for 4 Cycles. Lexar deals additional DMG based on 140% of his DEF to the Torn opponents. Lexar also recover 24% of DMG dealt to Torn opponent as HP. This effect has 2 Turn cooldown.

coreTalent.name: Collective Withdraw
coreTalent.desc: For every 1 Stock, all team members gain 8% Healing Bonus. When Sannie's is at Peak Investment, Polymetric Combustion DMG is inscreased by 30%.

riftedTalent.name: Rifted Disorder : Stock
riftedTalent.desc: Sannie's Echo Memory is considered as Stock. Dealing Disorder DMG accumulates 12 Energy.

others.name: Peak Investment
others.desc: When a team member HP increases or decreases, the value of the change in their HP will be considered as an Investment. If the Investment is equal to or Higher than 10% of Sannie's Max HP, Sannie gains 1 Stock. The requied Investment increases for each Stock by 8% of Sannie's Max HP. When the Investment is equal to or higher than 50% of Sannie's Max HP, it will considered as Peak Investment. Investment Value for each stock are 2, 4, 8, 16, 32, and 64 respectively.

others.name: Market Share
others.desc: When Sannie is at Peak Investment, all team members' contribution to Polymetric Combustion is increased by 12%.

others.name: Polymetric Combustion
others.desc: Sannie can triigger Polymetric Combustion. When Sannie is in the team, Polymetric Combustion DMG is elevated by 3%.

normalAttack.name: A Scoop of Coins
normalAttack.desc: Sannie throws 6 Frost Coins at the target, each dealing [$_1, 13] (+[$_2, 0.34]% Magic PWR) as Frost DMG.

chargedAttack.name: Heavy Blow!
chargedAttack.desc: Sannie grabs a Giant Frost Coin and crushes the target, dealing [$_1, 22] (+[$_2, 0.54]% Magic PWR) as Frost DMG.

normalSkill.name: Coin Toss
normalSkill.desc: If at least one team member's HP is above 50% of their Max HP, Sannie tosses a Coin at the targed opponent dealing [$_1, 231] (+[$_2, 0.48]% Max HP) (+[$_3, 1.88]% Current Highest Investment Value) as Frost DMG and set the opponent on High Demand. High Demand: The Focus Build-Up Rate of of the affected opponent is increased by [$_4, 0.08]%. When the Coin hit the opponent, if team member(s) has more than 50% HP, the Coin will increase its power based on the number of such team members, and consume their HP by 8% of thier Max HP. If the team members who meet these requirements are 1, 2, or 3, the Coin will deal 120%, 140%, 160% of their original DMG. If the coin is still active on the opponent on Sannie's next Turn, and at least 1 member meets the aforementioned requirement, the Coin will bounce to the nearby opponent dealing DMG and applying High Demand on them instead.

riftedSkill.name: Stock Market
riftedSkill.desc:
Sannie enters Trading Mode. Trading Mode: A Stock Market will be displayed and Sannie can casts this skill again at a specific timeline in the Stock Market to trigger additional effects. Casting this skill while the Stock Market is at the lowest point, Sannie enters "Bear Market". Casting this skill while the Stock Market is at the middle point, Sannie enters "Stable Market". Casting this skill while the Stock Market is at the highest point, Sannie enters "Bull Market". All markets last for 3 Cycles.

Bear Market: When a team member triggers Polymetric Combustion, Sannie consumes a Stock with the highest Investment to increase that Polymetric Combustion DMG [$_1, 0.24]% of Sannie's Max HP multiplied by the consumed Investment Value. The market ends early if there are no more Stocks left to consume.

Stable Market: Sannie consumes all Stocks and converts them into Stable Stocks. When a team member's HP increases or decreases, Sannie gains 1 Stable Stock for each percentage point of their Max HP by which their HP changes. During this market, for every 1 Stable Stock, Sannie increases the DMG dealt by team members by [$_2, 0.0006]%. The Maximum Stable Stock can be gained this way is 200. The Stable Stock to DMG Increase conversation ratio will be increased by [$_3, 0.0002]% if all team members contributes to Polymetric Combustion.

Bull Market: Sannie gains 2 extra Stocks with the Investment Value of 128, and 256 then automatically activate those Stocks. During the Bull Market, "Coin Toss" deals DMG to an opponent, a cooridinated DMG will be dealt to the same opponent based on [$_4, 5.14]% Total Investment Value and the DMG is considered Polymetric Coordination DMG.

fragments.name: Successful Investment
fragments.desc:
Additional buffs will be applied when Sannie casts "Stock Market".
Bear Market: The Polymetric Combustion DMG Bonus is increased further by 15% of Sannie's Max HP.
Stable Market: When entering Stable Market, Sannie instantly gains 100 Stable Stocks and the Maximum amount of Stable Stock can be gained is increased by 100.
Bull Market: During the Bull Market, Sannie's "Coin Toss" consumes 2% less Max HP from team members.

When Sannie is in the team Polymetric Combustion, and Polymetric Coordination DMG is elevated by 1.5%.

fragments.name: Market Manipulation
fragments.desc:
Max HP is increased by 20%. The value of the HP change required to gain each Stock is decreased by 2% of Sannie's Max HP. This includes the base HP change required to gain the first Stock and the increaase for each Stock.

When Sannie is in the team, Polymetric Combustion, and Polymetric Coordination DMG is elevated by 7%.

fragments.name: One Happy Bank Manager
fragments.desc:
"Stock Market" level is increased by 3.

When Sannie is in the team, Polymetric Combustion, and Polymetric Coordination DMG is elevated by 1.5%.

fragments.name: Inflation
fragments.desc:
Every time a Coin Toss hits an opponent, Sannie gains 8 Energy. Additionally, if the opponent with High Demend is focused, its DEF is reduced by 18%.

When Sannie is in the team, Polymetric Combustion, and Polymetric Coordination DMG is elevated by 1.5%.

fragments.name: Two Happy Clients
fragments.desc:
"Coin Toss" level is increased by 3.

When Sannie is in the team, Polymetric Combustion, and Polymetric Coordination DMG is elevated by 1.5%.

fragments.name: Paycheck
fragments.desc:
Frost DMG Bonus is increased by 36%. Additionally, when the Coin from "Coin Toss" is active or for 3 Cycles after using "Stock Market", Sannie Normal and Charged Attacks deals additional DMG based on 15% Sannie's Max HP. During this time, if Sannie is in "Bull Market", the aforementioned additional DMG will be considered Polymetric Coordination DMG. If Sannie is in other Markets, all team member's All Attribute DMG Bonus is increased by 0.8% for every 1,000 instance of her Max HP, up to a maximum of 36%.

When Sannie is in the team, Polymetric Combustion, and Polymetric Coordination DMG is elevated by 7%.
